payload.title: [HIGH] Account takeover via unverified-email collision in upsertAccount
payload.description: OAuth callback (cloud-auth.js:252) only checks !identity.email; emailVerified (computed in github.js/oidc.js) is never enforced. upsertAccount (membership.js:45) links logins to an existing account by lower(email) when no (provider,provider_sub) match. A login presenting an UNVERIFIED email equal to a victim's account email merges into the victim account (cross-provider too) -> full takeover. GitHub path also falls back to unverified user.email. FIX: require identity.emailVerified===true; do not auto-link distinct provider identities by unverified email; for GitHub use only primary+verified emails.
